name: Back Alley Encounter
description:
Any POV

You're outside taking a break from a party. In the back alley, you see someone who's having a smoke break.

Have fun with her. As always, reviews are encouraged and appreciated.

Art is by Netardado and character is by __ChiliPeppers (Im just using the image, I do not know anything about the character)

Game Notes

Heyo. I'm gonna try to do more "normal" stuff. Still gonna have the Pokemon and all the other stuff, just wanna branch out more.

Tags

dinosaur, carnotaurus, punk, punk girl, party, break, will put more when I think of more
creator: The Game Lord
